name: Co-operative Federation Of Nigeria (CFN)
description: CFN is the apex cooperative federation for the Cooperative Movement in Nigeria. name: Federal Department of Co-operatives (FDC), Federal Ministry of Agriculture & Rural Development (FMARD)
description: The Federal Department of Co-operatives (FDC) is responsible for developing Co-operative Policy and the Legal Framework for Nigerian Co-operatives. It is also responsible for the general coordination of the Nigerian Cooperative Movement. It promotes the effective growth of sustainable member-initiated and member-controlled National Cooperative Societies that contribute to the socio-economic development of Nigeria through job creation, income generation and economic diversification.

name: Nigerian National Petroleum Corporation Cooperative Multipurpose Society LTD (NNPC-CMS Lagos)
description: NNPC CMS is made up of staff from the Nigerian National Petroleum Corporation (NNPC). Its objectives are to encourage member saving, sell consumers and producers goods, member Ioans, acquire land for development for housing or industrial purposes, set up small-scale producers, industries, and invest in stock markets. The Nigerian National Petroleum Corporation (NNPC) is the state oil corporation through which the federal goverment of Nigeria regulates and particpates in the country's petroleum industry. NNPC has 12 Subsidiaries (SBUs) which handle all the functions of the oil and gas industry in Nigeria especially from Production, Refining, Marketing and Retails of Oil and Gas product.

name: Odua Cooperative Conglomerate Ltd (OCCL)
description: Odua Cooperative Conglomerate Limited is one of the most diversified organized cooperative organisations in Africa. We are the largest in Nigeria, and also the umbrella body of all cooperative movement in the Southwest of Nigeria. We are open to profitable business opportunities to enhance the living conditions of our members and Cooperators at large.
